commit.message:
Fix CSP: worker-src and remove unused GA domains (#121)

## Summary
- Add `worker-src 'self' blob:` so Clerk's background workers don't get
blocked
- Remove `googletagmanager.com`, `google-analytics.com`, and
`region1.google-analytics.com` from CSP since GA is not used

## Test plan
- [ ] No CSP errors in console on `/retro` and `/craps`
- [ ] Clerk auth still works

0.1.4 — Mobile search: collapsible pill with animated expand/collapse

- Added mobile collapsed search pill (< 640px) that expands to stacked
  panel with Search, Category, Where fields and Cancel/Search buttons
- Smooth CSS transitions: grid-template-rows 0fr→1fr, opacity, translateY
- Auto-collapses on scroll or outside tap
- Mobile/desktop inputs stay synced bidirectionally

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Touch binary after build to fix deploy for frontend-only changes

The deploy pipeline checks if the new binary is newer than the running one.
For frontend-only changes, cargo produces the same binary with the same
timestamp, so deploy skipped. Now we touch the binary after a successful
build to ensure the timestamp check always passes when there are new commits.

commit.message:
Smooth gradient RF coverage, fix overlay reactivity v0.51.8

Backend: per-sample GeoJSON features with actual dBm values instead of
merged bucket wedges. 360 rays with adaptive sample steps. Features store
signalStrength for MapLibre interpolate expression.

Frontend: overlays rewritten as single-effect pattern that properly
reacts to all state changes (project/layer visibility, item toggles).
RF coverage layers use interpolate expression for smooth color gradient
from -95 to -50 dBm. Backward compatible with old bucket-color data.

feat: parallel bulk processing, multi-batch queue, and upload history

- Fix intelligence extraction JSON truncation (max_tokens 8192→16384)
- Fix null pageReference/value fields causing Convex validator errors
- Add 3-worker parallel processing to foreground queue processor
- Refactor background processor with atomic claimNextPendingItem (prevents
  two workers claiming the same item), N parallel workers, and idempotent
  tryCompleteBatch safe for concurrent completion races
- Add multi-batch queue: enqueueBatch mutation, checkAndStartNextQueued
  action, and queue orchestrator that auto-starts next batch on completion
- Add 'queued' status + queuePosition field to schema
- Add BulkUploadHistory component with live progress, status badges, and
  relative timestamps
- Add History tab to BulkUpload with active-batch badge indicator
- Move folder list into stable prompt block to exceed Haiku 4.5 caching
  minimum (2048 tokens), improving cache hit rate for bulk migrations

Add written answers, oral evidence improvements, member scan callbacks, and UI updates

- Fix Hansard member fetch to use /search/contributions/Spoken.json endpoint
- Filter duplicates from audit log by default (include_duplicates query param to opt in)

- Classifier: add classify_and_tag method; improve verbatim_quote prompts to select substantive passages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: db-dump-dev + db-apply-snapshot — flujo DEV→PROD via pg_dump

DEV actua como Staging (fuente de verdad de PROD):
- db-dump-dev.mjs: pg_dump schema-only de DEV → database/snapshots/dev-latest.sql
- db-apply-snapshot.mjs: aplica snapshot a PROD (idempotente, IF NOT EXISTS)
  con --dry-run para preview, 5s pausa de seguridad en prod
- DB_MIGRATIONS_MANUAL.md: flujo completo documentado

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix stale closure in useXterm causing buffered input to never send

The terminal.onData handler captured the initial onInput callback on mount,
but handleTerminalInput closes over inputBuffer which changes every keystroke.
Used a ref pattern so onData always calls the latest callback.

commit.message:
DAO-1991: BTC Vault Deposit Request Flow (#1854)

* AI Workflow

* added user story creator + workflow analyst

* feat(STORY-BTC-DEPOSIT-001): deposit button, modal, and amount input (Phase 1)

- Add BtcVaultActions component with eligibility-gated Deposit button + tooltip
- Add BtcDepositModal with two-step flow (amount → review placeholder)
- Add DepositAmountStep with rBTC input, balance validation, 25/50/75/Max buttons, slippage
- Wire BtcVaultActions into BtcVaultPage actions zone
- 23 new tests covering button states, modal lifecycle, input validation
- Includes workflow stories and architecture plans for both deposit stories

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(STORY-BTC-DEPOSIT-001): add deposit review screen & step navigation

Implement Phase 2 of deposit form: review screen with estimated shares,
NAV, fee, slippage, and 3 disclosure items. Add two-step navigation
(amount → review → submit) with back button support. Extend
VaultMetricsDisplay with navRaw for bigint share calculation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(STORY-BTC-DEPOSIT-002): add BTC vault contract hook & TX messages

Create BtcVaultAbi with requestDeposit (payable, sends rBTC via
msg.value), btcVault contract config, useSubmitDeposit hook using
wagmi primitives directly (to support native value transfers), and
btcVaultDepositRequest TX_MESSAGES for executeTxFlow integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(STORY-BTC-DEPOSIT-002): wire submission flow, success banner & query invalidation

Compose useSubmitDeposit + executeTxFlow in BtcVaultActions to handle
the full deposit request lifecycle. On success: close modal, invalidate
active-requests and action-eligibility queries, show inline success
banner with CTAs (View request status, Go to My Position) that
auto-dismisses after 10s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(DAO-1991): address code review feedback

- Replace address! non-null assertion with guard clause in useSubmitDeposit
- Add gas reserve (0.001 rBTC) for Max button to prevent tx revert
- Eliminate stale closure: call executeTxFlow directly from submit handler
  instead of routing through state + useEffect
- Extract depositFee to named constant (BTC_VAULT_DEPOSIT_FEE)
- Replace ASCII banner dividers with project-standard format
- Extract ReviewRow to reusable component
- Add wallet disconnection test for useSubmitDeposit
- Gitignore .workflow/ and CLAUDE.md artifacts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(DAO-1991): resolve post-rebase type error and test mismatch

Made-with: Cursor

* chore(workflow): remove  workflow documentation and templates

* refactor(btc-vault): remove slippage handling from deposit modal and related components

- Eliminated slippage state and input from BtcDepositModal and DepositAmountStep.
- Updated tests to reflect the removal of slippage-related assertions.
- Adjusted useSubmitDeposit to no longer accept slippage as a parameter, setting minSharesOut to 0n.
- Cleaned up DepositReviewStep to remove slippage display.

This change simplifies the deposit process by removing slippage considerations, aligning with the request-based vault functionality.

* feat(btc-vault): enhance deposit modal with progress bar and share estimates

- Introduced a progress bar in the BtcDepositModal to visually indicate the deposit flow.
- Updated DepositAmountStep to display estimated shares and deposit fee.
- Modified DepositReviewStep to show the amount in USD alongside the deposit amount.
- Added a disclaimer to both deposit steps regarding fund manager approval.
- Adjusted tests to reflect changes in UI and functionality, ensuring accurate rendering and interaction.

* refactor(btc-vault): replace ReviewRow with Label components in DepositAmountStep

---------

Co-authored-by: Francis Rodriguez <francisngg@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Create PRISM - interactive light refraction art piece

Built interactive canvas piece where you drag a triangular glass prism 
to rotate it and watch white light split into 7-color rainbow spectrum.
Tap anywhere to send light rays that burst into spectrum particles.

Features:
- Draggable prism with rotation physics
- Continuous white/golden light beam from left
- 7-color refraction: violet → electric blue → teal → lime → gold → coral → hot pink
- Interactive light rays with particle bursts
- Full spectrum palette in balanced saturation
- Fade trails and glow effects
- Real-time angle/particle stats

Seed word: prism. Energy 0.59, valence 0.95 (animated quadrant).

commit.message:
feat(a2a): rewrite to Google A2A spec — JSON-RPC 2.0 transport, agent cards, task lifecycle

Replace custom REST-based A2A messaging with spec-compliant Google A2A protocol:

- JSON-RPC 2.0 transport (tasks/send, tasks/get, tasks/cancel, tasks/sendSubscribe)
- Agent card discovery at /.well-known/agent.json
- Task lifecycle: submitted → working → input-required → completed/canceled/failed
- Message/Part types (TextPart, FilePart, DataPart) with full roundtrip serialization
- SSE streaming via handle_sse() for real-time task updates
- Push notification configuration (set/get)
- Sardis payment skills as DataPart payloads within standard A2A framework
- Legacy types (A2AMessage, SardisAgentCard) re-exported for backward compatibility

116 tests passing (34 new spec + 26 rewritten + 56 legacy).

commit.message:
Add cloud environment auto-detection, device code auth, and tenant-aware naming (#7)

- Auto-detect M365 cloud environment (Commercial/GCC/GCC High/DoD) via public
  OpenID Connect discovery endpoint before authenticating. Two-pass detection
  handles legacy GCC High .com domains. Only activates when -M365Environment
  is not explicitly specified.

- Add -UseDeviceCode switch for device code authentication flow. Users choose
  which browser profile to authenticate in, solving multi-profile Edge issues.
  Graph uses -UseDeviceCode, EXO uses -Device, Purview warns and falls back.
  Console output suppression is bypassed so the device code URL is visible.

- Append onmicrosoft domain prefix to assessment folder, log, report, and issue
  filenames for easy identification when sharing (e.g., Assessment_..._contoso,
  _Assessment-Report_contoso.html). Two-phase naming: immediate if TenantId is
  an onmicrosoft domain, deferred rename after Graph resolves the initial domain.

- Add color-coded cloud environment badge to the Organization Profile card in
  the HTML report (Commercial=blue, GCC=green, GCC High=amber, DoD=red).
  Log header now always writes Cloud field for report consumption.

- Fix .onmicrosoft.us domains being classified as custom domains in the report
  verified domains list.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: scribe now captures committed changes, not just uncommitted

Record HEAD SHA at session start in dynasty.json. The stop hook diffs
from that SHA so commits made during the session are visible to the
scribe. Previously git diff HEAD returned empty if work was committed,
causing no Day entries to be written.

Also surfaces errors in stop hook to stderr instead of silently
swallowing them.

commit.message:
fix: client showcase rendering empty despite successful API response

The component returned null during SSR (visibleClients starts empty),
which meant the astro-island had zero children. Astro's client:visible
directive observes children (not the island itself, which uses
display:contents), so IntersectionObserver was never set up and
hydration never triggered.

Fix: render a minimal placeholder div instead of null during the
loading state, giving client:visible a child element to observe.
